.gitignore.general_idea: Exclude Maven Versions Plugin backup files from version control to keep the repository clean.
Ignore the Maven build output directory to prevent committing generated artifacts.

.gitlab-ci.yml.general_idea: Switch the CI base image from a specific JDK 11 Maven version to the latest Maven image to support JDK 21.
Define explicit CI pipeline stages (build, test, package, deploy) to structure the workflow.
Configure caching for the local Maven repository and target directory to speed up builds.
Create a dedicated job for compiling the project using Maven.
.gitlab-ci.yml.human_impl:
Build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - mvn compile

.gitlab-ci.yml.general_idea: Create a dedicated job for running tests using Maven.
.gitlab-ci.yml.human_impl:
Test:
  stage: test
  script:
    - mvn test

.gitlab-ci.yml.general_idea: Create a dedicated job for packaging the application using Maven.
.gitlab-ci.yml.human_impl:
Package:
  stage: package
  script:
    - mvn package

.gitlab-ci.yml.general_idea: Create a dedicated job for deploying the application.
.gitlab-ci.yml.human_impl:
Deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Maven deploy started"

.gitlab-ci.yml.general_idea: Rename the SonarCloud analysis job from 'sonarcloud-check' to 'Sonarcloud' for consistency.
Set MAVEN_OPTS to define the local repository location for consistent caching behavior.

Jenkinsfile.general_idea: Update the Jenkins pipeline to point to the new Git repository URL for the migrated project.
Remove hardcoded or specific Git credentials from the pipeline environment variables.
Update the Jenkins config file provider to use the new Maven settings ID corresponding to the new project name.

README.md.general_idea: Replace outdated project documentation with current version information and remove obsolete API endpoint listings.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced entire README content with 'Manager 2.0 - Development Version 2026.2'
